title: Harbor Container Port: Budgeted Berth-Plan Trials
strategies: trivial: trial the single domain-midpoint plan x=[0.5]*n budget-many times -> one cost point (off-frontier when center!=0.5), dominates baseline volume only -> ~0.1

greedy: uniform grid over the two trade-off variables, distance vars pinned to the frontier center (all on the cost frontier) -> spreads but grid is uneven on the curved frontier and ignores the asymmetric reference -> moderate

strong: uniform-grid seed + coordinate-wise local hypervolume ascent (multi-scale steps, keep only volume-increasing moves) -> reference-tuned skewed spread, materially more volume, still short of the global optimum -> higher, sub-1.0
